name: linGetOEMSleepInd
title: linGetOEMSleepInd
description: With this function it's possible to query the sleep indication bit of a Slave node.
Without parameter, the sleep indication bit of the calling slave is returned or zero if the caller is not a slave.

parameters.name: slaveName
parameters.description: Name of the queried Slave node as specified in the database.

return: -1: Function call not allowed, execution failed or invalid slave name given.
